_comment: Example lead-gen rubric. Copy to ~/.ohwow/workspaces/<ws>/lead-gen-config.json and edit. The private copy is gitignored. This file is the schema contract: workspace-specific ICP, competitors, and attribution URLs belong in the private copy and must never be committed here.

icp.description: Who your workspace sells to, in natural language. Used to prime the buyer-intent classifier. Keep it specific: 'small-team founders shipping AI agents' beats 'developers'.

freeGates._comment: Zero-cost filters applied to each ledger row before any LLM call. A row must pass ALL of these to reach the classifier. Defaults below came from E1–E4 tuning against a 60-row labeled corpus; see TUNING-NOTES.md.
freeGates._tuning_e1: minScore=0.6 is the F1 peak on the corpus (0.75). 0.55 also competitive (0.727). Below 0.55 noise leaks; above 0.65 buyer recall drops fast.
freeGates._tuning_e2: engagerBoost=0.4 recovers engager recall from 0 to 0.8 with no precision loss. Going lower (0.3, 0.2) adds no benefit on this corpus.
freeGates._tuning_e4: minTouches=1 is correct at day-1 (cold ledger). After day 3, bumping to minTouches=2 jumps F1 from 0.75 → 0.889 with no recall loss — buyers accumulate repeats, noise does not. Revisit this knob once the ledger has been running a week.
freeGates._volume_estimate: At observed x-intel cadence (1 run / 3h), expect ~15-40 sidecar authors/run → ~5-12 clear free-gates/run → ~2-6 buyer_intent/day → ~14-40 qualified CRM contacts/week at $2-6/month LLM spend (simple_classification at ~$0.0001/call).

engagerBoost._comment: If a row's sources include engager:own-post, engager:competitor, or dm, drop the score floor this low. Captures people engaging with us directly even when their post score is modest.

intentClassifier._comment: After freeGates, one simple_classification LLM call decides intent. Only acceptClasses with confidence >= minConfidence get promoted to the CRM.

engagerSurfaces._comment: Where to harvest engagers. Own-post replies/quotes are the strongest signal. Competitor-handle threads find people shopping in-category. Keep these lists small so each run finishes fast.

attribution._comment: Outbound links embed the contact's outreach_token. Landing URL should be a workspace-specific endpoint that records the token hit and redirects to the paid signup flow.
